info.title: cql-package
info.description:
Utilities for converting CQL or ELM into other artefacts, such as C#, .NET assemblies or FHIR Resources. Pick from a command listed below, or type [command] --help for more information on it.
DISCLAIMER:
The cql command is a very early addition and only supports basic cql translation. It is not yet production ready. If you find issues, please start from the ELM produced by the Java v3.29.0 tooling instead as input for the elm command.

options.name: --log-append
options.description: Append to existing log file, instead of clearing

options.name: --console-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to the console

options.name: --file-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to file

options.name: --log-file
options.description: The path of the log file. If not specified, no file logging is performed.

options.name: --profile
options.description:
The name of the profile to use from the configuration file. e.g. {App}.{Profile}.appsettings.json.
This can be used to load different profiles, for example a name of a library set.

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: elm
commands.description:
Start from ELM and convert to one or more of the following outputs: C#, DLL, PDB, FHIR Resources. When outputing to FHIR Resources, the CQL matchinging against the ELM based on their versioned identifier must be supplied as well.
DISCLAIMER:
The cql command is a very early addition and only supports basic cql translation. It is not yet production ready. If you find issues, please start from the ELM produced by the Java v3.29.0 tooling instead as input for the elm command.
Exit Codes:
0 - Success
2  - No ELM libraries found in the ELM input directory
3  - No ELM libraries compiled
4  - Cannot package: No matching CQL-ELM pairs found
5  - No output directories specified
6  - CQL directory is required when FHIR output is requested
13 - No CQL libraries found in the CQL input directory (when FHIR output is requested)
7  - If --pdb is specified, then --debug-symbols must be PortablePdb
8  - If --pdb is specified, then --dll is required
9  - If --debug-symbols is PortablePdb, then (--dll with --pdb) or (--fhir) or (--libraries with --measures) must be specified
17 - Cannot mix --fhir with --libraries or --measures
18 - Both --libraries and --measures must be specified together
19 - Failed to set up the log file

options.name: --cql
options.description:
CQL input directory containing CQL files "*.cql".
(REQUIRED with --fhir)

options.name: --elm
options.description: ELM input directory containing ELM files in JSON format "*.json".

options.name: --cs
options.description: C# output directory containing the generated C# source code files "*.g.cs" for the .NET assembly libraries.

options.name: --dll
options.description: DLL output directory which are .NET assembly libraries "*.dll" containing invokable CQL.

options.name: --pdb
options.description:
PDB output directory which contain the portable debug symbol files "*.pdb".
Allowed to be the same as DLL output directory.
(Used with --debug-symbols=PortablePdb, --dll is REQUIRED)

options.name: --fhir
options.description:
FHIR Resource output directory which contains the FHIR library files in JSON format "Library-*.json" and FHIR measures in JSON format "Measure-*.json".
Cannot be used with --libraries or --measures (mutually exclusive).

options.name: --libraries
options.description:
FHIR Libraries output directory which contains the FHIR library files in JSON format "Library-*.json".
Must be used together with --measures. Cannot be combined with --fhir.

options.name: --measures
options.description:
FHIR Measures output directory which contains the FHIR measure files in JSON format "Measure-*.json".
Must be used together with --libraries. Cannot be combined with --fhir.

options.name: --canonical-root-url
options.description:
The root canonical url output in FHIR library.
(Used with --fhir)

options.name: --override-utc-date-time
options.description:
Override date output in FHIR library.
(Used with --fhir)

options.name: --json-pretty
options.description:
Output JSON using multiline and indentation.
(Used with --fhir)

options.name: --debug-symbols
options.description: The way debug symbols are emitted when generating .NET assemblies. Options are:

options.name: --cs-namespace
options.description:
The C# namespace to use for generated code.
(Used with --cs or --dll)

options.name: --flatten-dir-hierarchy
options.description:
Flatten the output directory structure, ignoring subdirectories from the input.
By default, subdirectory structure is preserved from input to output directories.

options.name: --log-append
options.description: Append to existing log file, instead of clearing

options.name: --console-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to the console

options.name: --file-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to file

options.name: --log-file
options.description: The path of the log file. If not specified, no file logging is performed.

options.name: --profile
options.description:
The name of the profile to use from the configuration file. e.g. {App}.{Profile}.appsettings.json.
This can be used to load different profiles, for example a name of a library set.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: DISCLAIMER:
commands.description:
The cql command is a very early addition and only supports basic cql translation. It is not yet production ready. If you find issues, please start from the ELM produced by the Java v3.29.0 tooling instead as input for the elm command.
Exit Codes:
0 - Success
- No ELM libraries found in the ELM input directory
- Cannot package: No matching CQL-ELM pairs found

- CQL directory is required when FHIR output is requested
13 - No CQL libraries found in the CQL input directory (when FHIR output is requested)
- If --pdb is specified, then --debug-symbols must be PortablePdb
- If --pdb is specified, then --dll is required

- If --debug-symbols is PortablePdb, then (--dll with --pdb) or (--fhir) or (--libraries with --measures) must be specified
17 - Cannot mix --fhir with --libraries or --measures
18 - Both --libraries and --measures must be specified together
19 - Failed to set up the log file

commands.name: cql
commands.description:
Start from CQL and convert to one or more of the following outputs: ELM, C#, DLL, PDB, FHIR Resources. Take note of the disclaimer above.
DISCLAIMER:
The cql command is a very early addition and only supports basic cql translation. It is not yet production ready. If you find issues, please start from the ELM produced by the Java v3.29.0 tooling instead as input for the elm command.
Exit Codes:
0 - Success
1  - No CQL libraries found in the CQL input directory
3  - No ELM libraries compiled
4  - Cannot package: No matching CQL-ELM pairs found
5  - No output directories specified
7  - If --pdb is specified, then --debug-symbols must be PortablePdb
8  - If --pdb is specified, then --dll is required
9  - If --debug-symbols is PortablePdb, then (--dll with --pdb) or (--fhir) or (--libraries with --measures) must be specified
16 - No CQL libraries converted to ELM
17 - Cannot mix --fhir with --libraries or --measures
18 - Both --libraries and --measures must be specified together
19 - Failed to set up the log file

options.name: --cql
options.description: CQL input directory containing CQL files "*.cql".

options.name: --elm
options.description: ELM input directory containing ELM files in JSON format "*.json".

options.name: --cs
options.description: C# output directory containing the generated C# source code files "*.g.cs" for the .NET assembly libraries.

options.description: DLL output directory which are .NET assembly libraries "*.dll" containing invokable CQL.

options.name: --pdb
options.description:
PDB output directory which contain the portable debug symbol files "*.pdb".
Allowed to be the same as DLL output directory.
(Used with --debug-symbols=PortablePdb, --dll is REQUIRED)

Cannot be used with --libraries or --measures (mutually exclusive).

options.name: --override-utc-date-time

Flatten the output directory structure, ignoring subdirectories from the input.
By default, subdirectory structure is preserved from input to output directories.

commands.description: - No CQL libraries found in the CQL input directory

commands.name: extract-library-attachments
commands.description:
ALPHA FEATURE: This command is currently in alpha and its behavior may change in future releases.
Extract attachments from a FHIR Library resource to individual files. Given a FHIR Library resource file, this command extracts embedded attachments (CQL, ELM, C#, DLL, PDB) and saves them to the specified output directories.
Exit Codes:
0 - Success
5  - No output directories specified
10 - Library extraction error occurred
15 - FHIR Library must have a Name property
19 - Failed to set up the log file

options.name: --library-file
options.description: FHIR Library resource file in JSON format containing embedded attachments.

options.name: --cql-dir
options.description:
CQL output directory for extracted CQL files "*.cql".
(At least one output directory must be specified)

options.name: --elm-dir
options.description:
ELM output directory for extracted ELM JSON files "*.json".
(At least one output directory must be specified)

options.name: --csharp-dir
options.description:
C# output directory for extracted C# source code files "*.g.cs".
(At least one output directory must be specified)

options.name: --dll-dir
options.description:
DLL output directory for extracted .NET assembly libraries "*.dll".
(At least one output directory must be specified)

options.name: --pdb-dir
options.description:
PDB output directory for extracted portable debug symbol files "*.pdb".
(At least one output directory must be specified)

options.name: --log-append
options.description: Append to existing log file, instead of clearing

options.name: --console-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to the console

options.name: --file-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to file

options.name: --log-file
options.description: The path of the log file. If not specified, no file logging is performed.

options.name: --profile
options.description:
The name of the profile to use from the configuration file. e.g. {App}.{Profile}.appsettings.json.
This can be used to load different profiles, for example a name of a library set.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: replace-library-attachments
commands.description:
ALPHA FEATURE: This command is currently in alpha and its behavior may change in future releases.
Replace attachments in an existing FHIR library resource. Given a FHIR library file and one or more attachment files, this command replaces or adds the corresponding content in the library (identified by content type: +cql, +elm, +dll, +pdb, +csharp). If --library-out-file is not specified, the library-file will be updated in-place. If --library-out-file is specified, library-file will be copied to library-out-file, and the latter will be updated.
Note: When replacing the ELM attachment (--elm-file), the CQL options parameters in the FHIR Library resource will be automatically overridden with the values from the new ELM file.
Exit Codes:
0 - Success
11 - No input files specified or one or more input files do not exist
12 - Invalid library JSON
14 - Invalid FHIR library, missing required Name and Version
19 - Failed to set up the log file
99 - Unknown error occurred during processing

options.name: --library-file
options.description: FHIR library file in JSON format to read from.

options.name: --library-out-file
options.description:
Output file for the updated library. If not specified, the library-file will be updated in-place.
If specified, library-file will be copied to this location, and this file will be updated with the new attachments.

options.name: --cql-file
options.description: CQL file to replace or add as +cql content in the library.

options.name: --elm-file
options.description:
ELM file in JSON format to replace or add as +elm content in the library.
Note: When this is replaced, the CQL options parameters in the FHIR Library will be overridden with values from the new ELM file.

options.name: --csharp-file
options.description: C# source file to replace or add as +csharp content in the library.

options.name: --dll-file
options.description: DLL file to replace or add as +dll content in the library.

options.name: --pdb-file
options.description: PDB file to replace or add as +pdb content in the library.

options.name: --json-pretty
options.description: Output JSON using multiline and indentation.

options.name: --log-append
options.description: Append to existing log file, instead of clearing

options.name: --console-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to the console

options.name: --file-log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to output to file

options.name: --log-file
options.description: The path of the log file. If not specified, no file logging is performed.

options.name: --profile
options.description:
The name of the profile to use from the configuration file. e.g. {App}.{Profile}.appsettings.json.
This can be used to load different profiles, for example a name of a library set.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
